409.description: The resource was modified by another user

delete.description: Deletes a factory by its ID.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all warehouses.

404.description: Country or City does not exist

post.description: Uploads one or more images for an existing warehouse.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all vehicles.

post.description: Registers a new vehicle in the system. Images should be uploaded separately.
Uploads one or more images for an existing vehicle.

delete.description: Deletes one or more images associated with a vehicle.

400.description: Invalid image IDs or request body

post.description: Uploads one image for registered user.
Registers a new user and sends an account verification email.

409.description: User with this username or email already exists

get.description: Searches managers using an optional keyword and returns a paginated list of matching results.

post.description: Creates a new manager account by admin. Manager must change password on first login. Email activation is skipped.

409.description: Manager with this username or email already exists

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all products.

post.description: Registers a new product in the system. Image should be uploaded separately.
Uploads one image for an existing product.
Creates an order for a specific product by a company with the specified quantity.

403.description: Unauthorized to order for this company

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all factories.

post.description: Creates a new factory record without files. Files should be uploaded separately.

404.description: Country or City does not exist

post.description: Uploads one or more images for an existing factory.
Creates a new company record without files. Files should be uploaded separately.

404.description: Country or City does not exist

post.description: Uploads one or more files (images, PDFs) for an existing company.
Authenticates a user using username and password, and returns an access token and expiration info.

patch.description: Suspends a user by their ID.
Verifies a user account using the hash sent via email. The account will be activated upon successful verification.

404.description: User not found or hash is invalid

patch.description: Changes the password for a user. Validates old password, password confirmation, and ensures the new password is different from the old one.

404.description: User not found or password validation failed

get.description: Returns the company by ID along with its files.

patch.description: Updates the status of a company (e.g., APPROVED or REJECTED).

get.description:
Searches warehouses using optional filter criteria.

**Available filters:**
- `name`: Exact or partial name match
- `address`: Exact or partial address match
- `countryId`: Filter by warehouse country
- `cityId`: Filter by warehouse city
Results are paginated.
Retrieves a vehicle connection status by its ID.
Retrieves a vehicle location by its ID.

get.summary: Get vehicle distance data for a time range
get.description: Retrieves aggregated distance traveled data for a specific vehicle within a given time range. The data is automatically aggregated into appropriate time windows based on the date range provided. Supports time ranges up to 1 year.

400.description: Invalid request parameters (missing start/end date or invalid date range)

get.description:
Searches vehicles using optional filter criteria.

**Available filters:**
- `registration`: Exact or partial registration number match
- `brandId`: Filter by vehicle brand
- `modelId`: Filter by vehicle model
- `minLoad`: Minimum load capacity
- `maxLoad`: Maximum load capacity
- `search`: General text search across registration, brand, model, and more

Results are paginated.
Fetches a list of all brands in the system.

get.summary: Get all models of a brand
get.description: Returns all models that belong to the given brand ID.

Searches products using optional filter criteria.
All parameters are optional and can be combined.

**Available filters:**
- `name`: Exact or partial name match (case-insensitive)
- `description`: Exact or partial description match
- `minPrice / maxPrice`: Numeric range for product price
- `minWeight / maxWeight`: Numeric range for product weight (in grams/kg)
- `onSale`: Boolean flag to filter discounted items (`true`/`false`)
- `categoryId`: The unique identifier of the product category

Results are paginated.

400.description: Invalid search parameters (e.g. negative price or invalid format)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products that are currently available (on sale or in stock).
Retrieves a factory connection status by its ID.

get.summary: Get products produced by a factory
get.description: Returns a paginated list of products that are produced by the factory identified by the given factory ID.

get.summary: Get production data for a product
get.description: Retrieves real-time production statistics for a specific product in a specific factory. Supports optional filtering by date range and aggregation period.

400.description: Invalid request parameters (e.g., invalid date range)

get.description:
Searches factories using optional filter criteria.

**Available filters:**
- `name`: Exact or partial name match
- `cityId`: Filter by city
- `countryId`: Filter by country
- `address`: Exact or partial address match

Results are paginated.
Retrieves the list of factories where the specified product is being produced.

200.description: Factories producing the product retrieved successfully

get.description: Fetches a list of all countries in the system.

get.summary: Get all cities of a country
get.description: Returns all cities that belong to the given country ID.
Returns the list of pending companies.

Returns a list of companies owned by the currently authenticated user.
The response contains only basic company information (id and name).
Returns a list of all cities available in the system.
Fetches a list of all categories in the system.
Checks whether the currently authenticated user is authorized to access a protected file.

200.description: User is authorized to access the file

403.description: User is not authorized to access the file

delete.description: Deletes one or more images associated with a factory.

400.description: Invalid image IDs or request body
